warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
5 Hindu Push Ups
10m bear Crawls
10 x Inch Worms
10 Cossack Squats

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
6 RFT - 15 minute cap
5 HSPU
6 T2B
35 Double Unders

gymnastics:
EMOM x 4
12 Hollow Rocks
T2B Bar Progression
1-2 mins False Grip on bar - focus on Knuckles Up
EMOM x 3
10 x Beat Swing
EMOM x 3
Bigger Beat Swing - Push Down on Bar
- Put Ball between feet - Reach Long in the Arch - Dont bend the knees
EMOM x 3
Knees to Chest - Aggressive & Pop - pause when weightless
EMOM x 4
Beat Swing with Straight legs - to target
Aim for height without losing tension.
EMOM x 6
T2B Practice
Wall Walk to Handstand Push Up
EMOM x 3
Wall Facing Handstand Hold
EMOM x 3
Adjust weight between hands
EMOM x 5
1-3 Wall Walks
EMOM x 5
Kipping Handstand Push Ups or Wall Walks - NO MAX SETS

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes shoulders, core, and triceps; addressing posterior chain and glutes builds balance without competing for recovery.
